title: Work
subtitle: 4+ years of production experience building and deploying AI/ML systems across FMCG, IoT, and SaaS industries.

items.desc: Architecting and shipping AI-driven Revenue Growth Management solutions for Pakistan's leading FMCG brands — EBM, PMI, RB-PK, and Unilever. Built an LLM-powered NL-to-SQL engine querying 14M+ rows, a RAG-based Sales Intelligence Chat platform with multi-turn memory, and stockout forecasting pipelines that reduced out-of-stock events by 20%. Delivered containerized ML workflows via FastAPI and Django, integrated into client SaaS platforms.

Boosted HVAC energy forecasting accuracy by 25% through an ARIMA + LSTM + XGBoost ensemble, deployed into a live IoT monitoring platform. Engineered anomaly detection pipelines that flagged equipment failures in real time, and built Streamlit dashboards surfacing ML insights to non-technical facility managers.

Delivered multi-model sales forecasting using Prophet, LSTM, and XGBoost alongside RFM customer segmentation for a retail analytics platform. Engineered interactive BI dashboards and automated backend reporting services, significantly reducing manual analysis overhead for the client team.

Taught Programming Fundamentals, Data Structures, and Software Engineering to undergraduate students. Designed practical coursework and mentored final-year capstone projects, guiding students through end-to-end software development cycles from problem analysis to deployment.
